raw_text:
<think>
The user request: "packet_id=SFFRESCUE-29F40C46105D69ACBACB
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines, fields in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No extra lines. Must begin with route_verdict=.

Thus output should be:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra spaces or formatting.

Check if any special characters: "preserve source-grounded reasoning" includes hyphens. That should be okay. "do not invent source IDs" includes uppercase IDs; okay.

The user says: "Return the three-line status record." So we output exactly those three lines.

Thus final.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
